en: The decorative diamond-shaped back pocket, buttonhole button (no bag, no pocket cloth), and a 0.5cm open wire is fixed behind the black pocket flap
Only standard flap left back pocket ,no right back pocket
Only standard flap right back pocket ,no left back pocket
17cm processed letter pleated adhesive bag with right angle bag cover under the side seam pocket (special clean board)

Square extension, with double buttonholes and buttons at the top and bottom, double hooks. Buttons are attached according to the buttonhole positions, with an additional button sewn 3.0 cm above and below each (toward the side seam, totaling 4 buttons).
Left and right HW pointed extension with buckels, specified buckles (waist can’t adjust measurements)-
HW pointed extension with buckle and five round holes, buckle appointed-
HW slender round sword head lock eye nail buckle, with a spacing of 3.0cm and 1 nail buckle,and a waist width of 5.0cm must be selected
Only one beltloop in right front waist, 5CM from the fly, no other beltloops
Only the waist of the right pants is 2cm away from the front door with one strap, and there is no strap in other positions
Only one beltloop in right front waist, move 1cm toward the fly, no other beltloops
Add HW square head adjustment pliers at the waist (special clean plate, with a net length of 6.5cm before and after the side seam)-
Add HW square adjusted tab with buckle at the back middle waist-
Add HW pointed adjusted tab on the back middle waist, two buttons at both sides, totally 4 buttons

en: The customer shall ensure the size of the thigh, and accept the adjustment of the thigh, which leads to the crotch clamp, improper, feeding quantity and other problems in the inner seam, and the size adjustment of the related parts such as the u-rise
Thigh is smaller than limitation, confirm to proceed(the relevant size will be influenced)
Waist measurement adjusted out of range,customer accept the effect
Waist measurement adjustment is beyond the range, the customer accepts this effect and hip measurement and other related parts of the size adjustment
Pants long adjustment beyond the scope, customers accept this effect
The u-rise crotch is smaller than the normal person (special figure is beyond the range, the customer accepts this effect and adjusts the size of relevant parts such as hip measurement)
U-rise adjustment: U-rise is bigger than normal
Fabric sample(5cm square ) sent with garment
Adding silk lining on back cortch seam （When the fabric doesn't stick, it will be treated as invalid information）

Special fabric, cusotmer insist to do it
Unfinished bottom,fold up and fix by baste stitching
